arts.sum: Manchester City are on their worst losing run under Pep Guardiola and their Premier League title defence is under serious threat.

arts.ttl: Perfect dozen for Bompastor's Chelsea as Man Utd are brushed aside
arts.sum: Guro Reiten's first-half penalty kept up Chelsea's perfect start to the season and secured a 12th successive victory for Sonia Bompastor with a 1-0 win over Man Utd.

arts.ttl: Amorim to hand 16-year-old Man Utd wonderkid his debut

arts.ttl: Man Utd line up transfer not approved by Ruben Amorim despite public demand
